security.item: Hardened article, category, tag and access-level IN filters with Joomla query array bindings.

change.item: Added Joomla Web Asset Manager metadata and moved small layout sizing rules into a scoped CSS file.
Updated package metadata for the Joomla 6.1.1 maintenance release.
Added the full GPL-2.0 license text to the release package.

fix.item: Removed inline sizing styles from carousel controls, indicators, badges and thumbnails.
Escaped formatted date output in the shared meta partial.
Improved carousel accessibility labels and safer autoplay default for new module instances.

note.item: Existing module autoplay settings are preserved on upgrade; the new default only affects newly created module instances.

change.item: Added the manifest XML file to the installer file list.
Normalized README layout wording for the Joomla 6.1.1 release.

fix.item: Hardened JSON-LD output with safe JSON_HEX encoding flags.
Normalized schema image URLs to absolute URLs.
Updated changelog metadata to the Joomla changelog item format.
